wolffuel.title: WolfFuel
wolffuel.catchphrase: The next-generation fuel price comparison platform in France
wolffuel.description: WolfFuel is a web service I designed and built from the ground up, helping French drivers find the cheapest gas station around them in real time. The platform features full authentication (Google OAuth + email), an interactive map, a premium subscription system (Wolf Pro at €2.99/month) powered by PayPal, and an immersive dark/purple interface with canvas animations. The entire stack — frontend, backend, database, payments, deployment — was built solo.

coming_soon.title: More projects in progress
coming_soon.description: I'm currently working on several other projects (web apps, AI bots, client sites) that will be added here very soon. To see examples, contact me directly.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: Prices depend on the package: Starter at €80, Pro Business at €200, or Premium Custom at €450. I also provide custom quotes for projects outside the packages.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Starter: 5 days. Pro Business: 7 days. Premium Custom: 14 days. Deadlines are guaranteed in the Fiverr contract.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Payment goes through Fiverr (credit card, PayPal) or directly by bank transfer. I ask for 50% upfront for projects outside Fiverr.

items.question: Do you provide hosting?
items.answer: I deploy on the best platforms (Vercel, Supabase) and can manage hosting for you. I explain everything and you remain the owner of your infrastructure.

items.question: What if I want to modify the site afterward?
items.answer: The first 30 days of support are included in every package. After that, I offer maintenance packages or on-demand modifications.

items.question: Do you only work with French clients?
items.answer: Not at all! I work with clients across Europe and worldwide. Everything happens online — video calls, messaging, digital delivery. No borders.

items.question: Are you available for long-term projects?
items.answer: Yes, I'm available for long-term engagements (daily rate or monthly retainer), especially for startups or companies looking for a regular freelance developer.
